headline: What CDW (CDW)'s New Strategy and Transformation Chief Hire Means For Shareholders
summary: CDW Corporation recently announced that Hang Tan joined the company on April 27, 2026 as Chief Strategy and Transformation Officer, reporting to Chair and CEO Christine A. Leahy and overseeing enterprise strategy, the transformation office, and corporate development. Tan’s background leading hybrid cloud operations, corporate strategy, and large-scale transformation at Hewlett Packard Enterprise and Bain suggests CDW is reinforcing its focus on complex, services-led technology solutions that...
